name: OpenText-new-May-22-ISV-2
description: SCIM endpoint built FAITHFULLY from the OpenText schema supplied on 2026-05-22 (opentext scim schema_himanshu_May_22_2026.json). Preserves Group.externalId (caseExact:true) and the OpenText Mailbox extension verbatim (including canonicalValues:[]) - both of which ISV-1 had to strip. SINGLE FORCED DEVIATION: Group.displayName uniqueness is server (original was none); the SCIMServer tighten-only validator (RFC 7643 §7) rejects loosening below the RFC baseline of server, and per RFC 7643 §7 a server MAY enforce stricter than advertised. ServiceProviderConfig values are inferred from the SPC meta-schema's capability set.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: The components of the users real name

subAttributes.name: givenName
subAttributes.description: The given name of the User, or first name in most Western languages(e.g., 'Barbara' given the full name 'Ms. Barbara J Jensen, III').

subAttributes.name: familyName
subAttributes.description: The family name of the User, or last name in most Western languages(e.g., 'Jensen' given the full name 'Ms. Barbara J Jensen, III').

attributes.name: displayName
attributes.description: The name of the User, suitable for display to end-users.  The name SHOULD be the full name of the User being described, if known.

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: The user's title, such as 'Vice President.'

attributes.name: emails
attributes.description: Email addresses for the user.  The value SHOULD be canonicalized by the service provider, e.g., 'bjensen@example.com' instead of 'bjensen@EXAMPLE.COM'. Canonical type values of 'work', 'home', and 'other'.

subAttributes.name: value
subAttributes.description: The significant value for the attribute

subAttributes.name: type
subAttributes.description: A label indicating the attribute's function

attributes.name: phoneNumbers
attributes.description: Phone numbers for the User.  The value SHOULD be canonicalized by the service provider according to the format specified in RFC 3966, e.g., 'tel:+1-201-555-0123'. Canonical type values of 'work', 'home', 'mobile', 'fax', 'pager', and 'other'.

subAttributes.name: value
subAttributes.description: The significant value for the attribute

subAttributes.name: type
subAttributes.description: A label indicating the attribute's function

attributes.name: addresses
attributes.description: A physical mailing address for this User. Canonical type values of 'work', 'home', and 'other'.  This attribute is a complex type with the following sub-attributes.

subAttributes.name: streetAddress
subAttributes.description: The full street address component, which may include house number, street name, P.O.box, and multi-line extended street address information.This attribute MAY contain newlines.

subAttributes.name: type
subAttributes.description: A label indicating the attribute's function

subAttributes.name: primary
subAttributes.description: A Boolean value indicating the 'primary'  or preferred attribute value for this attribute, The primary attribute value 'true' MUST appear no more than once.

attributes.name: department
attributes.description: Identifies the name of a department.

attributes.name: displayName
attributes.description: A human-readable name for the Group. REQUIRED. (uniqueness tightened from OpenText 'none' to 'server' to satisfy the SCIMServer RFC 7643 §7 tightening-only policy.)

attributes.name: externalId
attributes.description: A String that is an identifier for the resource as defined by the provisioning client.

attributes.name: members
attributes.description: A list of members of the Group.

subAttributes.name: value
subAttributes.description: Identifier of the member of this Group.

subAttributes.name: $ref
subAttributes.description: The URI of the corresponding 'User' resource to which the user belongs.

subAttributes.name: display
subAttributes.description: A human-readable name, primarily used for display purposes.

subAttributes.name: type
subAttributes.description: A label indicating the type of resource, e.g., 'User'. Added to satisfy SCIMServer member-resolution which auto-populates this sub-attribute.

schemas.name: MailboxExtensionResource
schemas.description: OpenText extension schema for mailbox-specific attributes not defined in the SCIM core schema.

attributes.name: proxyAddresses
attributes.description: The known address entities for the resource.  The value SHOULD be prefixed by the address type, e.g, 'SMTP:bjensen@example.com' or 'smtp:bjensen@example.com'.

subAttributes.name: value
subAttributes.description: The significant value for the attribute

subAttributes.name: type
subAttributes.description: A label indicating the attribute's function
